
Cassie shouted, "HALLO, DADDY!" and punched him in his foice!

Daddy sobbed, “Why for you punch me? Your ‘daddÆ’!?” crying in the corner.

Cassie replied resolutely, “It's tough—love! BABY! Isn’t it?” 💪🏽😘💪🏽

Then, she gave a list of reasons for the season:
1. Jesus (£0.99 or £1)
2. Ham Sandwich (£100)
3. Couch Gun (£99.99)
4. Christos'/Christos’ büger-månchë (USD$9,999.99); and
5. Houdini’s mother-in-law’s sister's niece's husband, ‘wHo-dean-eeee’ (30°C for 30% off).

"Who owns this piece of memorabilia Americana?", Cassie asked. (Someone in the back shouted...) It is Christos'.

Is it Christos'!?

It is Christos’!!

The whole crowd erupted, “IT IS CHRISTOS’!!! ‘It is Christos'’! It is Christos'”

Daddy asked her to fax him her email address: cassie@iggle-piggle.nightgarden.co.uk; but she didn't have enough tokens...

You can download this whole episode at: https://example.com/stories/stupid-dad--alternate.
